description_long: This is a vintage-style wooden armchair with a high, tufted backrest and plush, buttoned leather upholstery in a deep brown color. The frame is constructed from dark-stained wood, featuring elegantly curved legs and armrests with decorative turned spindles beneath each arm. The seat cushion is thick and matches the backrest in both color and tufted pattern, providing a comfortable sitting experience. The back of the chair is solid wood with horizontal support slats, giving it a sturdy and classic appearance. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional craftsmanship and comfort, making it suitable for refined urban settings such as lobbies, waiting areas, or upscale patios. The materials and build indicate durability and a focus on both aesthetics and function.
description: A vintage wooden armchair with a high, tufted brown leather backrest and seat, featuring curved legs and decorative armrest spindles. The chair exudes classic elegance and comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chair's curved wooden legs, high tufted backrest, and detailed armrest spindles.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, button-tufted leather seat and backrest, as well as the symmetrical armrests.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the curved legs and armrest details, with the plush seat and backrest visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the solid wooden back with horizontal support slats and the top of the leather backrest.
